---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Use Case
What problem does this feature solve? What is your use case?

## Proposed Solution
How should this feature work? What would the API/interface look like?

## Alternatives Considered
What other solutions or workarounds have you considered?

## Additional Context
Any other context, examples, or mockups about the feature request.

## Would you like to implement this?
- [ ] Yes, I can submit a PR
- [ ] No, I need help
